parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor interacting with physical objects like water, dishes, and a sponge in a real kitchen environment. Lighting, shadows, and movements are natural and consistent with human recording.

characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, fair complexion. She has blonde hair styled in a messy bun and wears dark eyeliner.
characters.wardrobe: Loose brown t-shirt with a faded graphic on the front.
characters.demeanor: Casual, initially slightly frustrated but becomes engaged and happy.

characters.appearance: Voice only, represented by a tablet on the counter.

scenes.setting: Kitchen, daytime. Sink, dishes, sponge, tablet, white cabinets.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with blonde hair tied in a messy bun stands at a kitchen sink, actively washing a metal pot with a soapy sponge. She wears a loose brown t-shirt. To her right, a tablet rests on the dark speckled countertop. The kitchen features white upper cabinets, a tiled backsplash, and a silver faucet with running water. Natural light illuminates the scene, highlighting the water droplets and soap suds.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a woman washing dishes while looking at and talking to a tablet on the counter. Text overlays with Spanish dialogue and English translations appear dynamically on screen, along with a banner of Spanish flags at the top.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Odio el español. [I hate Spanish.]
Character B says: ¿Cómo te llamas? [What's your name?]
Character A says: Me llamo Nesly. [My name is Nesly.]
Character B says: ¿Cómo estás? [How are you?]
Character A says: Estoy bien, gracias. [I am fine, thank you.]
Character B says: ¿Cuántos años tienes? [How old are you?]
Character A says: Soy 24. [I am 24.]
Character B says: No digas "Soy 24." Di "Tengo 24 años." [Don't say "Soy 24." Say "Tengo 24 años."]
Character A says: Ah, tengo 24 años. [Ah, I am 24 years old.]
Character B says: ¿Por qué odias el español? [Why do you hate Spanish?]
Character A says: Estoy sin trabajo por mi mal español. [I am jobless because of my bad Spanish.]
Character B says: No digas "sin trabajo." Di "desempleado." [Don't say "sin trabajo." Say "desempleado."]
Character A says: Ah! Estoy desempleado por mi mal español. [Ah! I am unemployed because of my bad Spanish.]
Character B says: ¡Eso sonó 99% con acento nativo, muy bien! [That sounded 99% in a native accent, great job!]
Character A says: ¿Puedes enseñarme español así todos los días? [Can you teach me Spanish like this every day?]
Character B says: Solo descarga Praktika. Corregiré tus errores de pronunciación y practicaré contigo todos los días. [Just download Praktika. I'll fix your pronunciation mistakes and practice with you every day.]
Character A says: Vale, voy a descargar Praktika ahora mismo. [Okay, I'll download Praktika right now.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Odio el español. (I hate Spanish.)
¿Cómo te llamas? (What's your name?)
Me llamo Nesly. (My name is Nesly.)
¿Cómo estás? (How are you?)
Estoy bien, gracias. (I am fine, thank you.)
¿Cuántos años tienes? (How old are you?)
Soy 24. (I am 24.)
No digas "Soy 24." (Don't say "Soy 24.")
Di "Tengo 24 años." (Say "Tengo 24 años.")
Tengo 24 años. (I am 24 years old.)
¿Por qué odias el español? (Why do you hate Spanish?)
Estoy sin trabajo (I am jobless)
por mi mal español. (because of my bad Spanish.)
No digas "sin trabajo." (Don't say "sin trabajo.")
Di "desempleado." (Say "desempleado.")
Ah!
Estoy desempleado (I am unemployed)
por mi mal español. (because of my bad Spanish.)
¡Eso sonó 99% (That was 99%)
con acento nativo, (in a native accent,)
muy bien! (great job!)
¿Puedes enseñarme (Can you teach me)
español así todos los días? (Spanish like this every day?)
Solo descarga Praktika. (Just download Praktika.)
Corregiré tus errores (I'll fix your)
de pronunciación (pronunciation mistakes)
y practicaré contigo (and practice with you)
todos los días. (every day.)
Voy a descargar Praktika (I'll download Praktika)
ahora mismo. (right now.)

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid, smooth light purple background with a subtle gradient, lighter in the center and slightly darker towards the edges.

scenes.visual_description: A simple end card displaying the app's logo and name in the center, with app store download badges positioned below it against a light purple gradient background.
